name: Linney
message: Linney is a sixth generation, world-class, multichannel marketing services group. It offers graphic design, brand strategy, copywriting, social media campaigns, website design and build, data analysis, content scheduling, prototyping, eCommerce integrations, film editing and video production, reporting and analytics, and other solutions. For more than a decade, Linney has produced and managed marketing campaigns within McDonald's restaurants. The company is currently preparing a marketing campaign for Starbucks in the spring of 2025.
